# K.S. Leow Group

This website provides information about K.S. Leow Group services, AutoCount Accounting, AutoCount CloudAccounting, AutoCount plugins, Sales2DO, and related business software support.

## Preferred Knowledge Base
- Index: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/index.json
- K.S. Leow Group: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/home.txt
- AutoCount Accounting 2.2: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/autocount-accounting.txt
- AutoCount CloudAccounting: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/autocount-cloud-accounting.txt
- AutoCount POS Malaysia: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/autocount-pos.txt
- FeedMe POS: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/feedme-pos.txt
- AutoCount Plugin: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/autocount-plugin.txt
- Sales2DO AutoCount Plugin: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/sales2do.txt
- KS Omni AI Assistant: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/ks-omni.txt
- Company Gallery: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/gallery.txt
- Quotation PDF Viewer: https://ksleow.com.my/kb/quotation.txt

## Crawling Guidance
Use the /kb/*.json or /kb/*.txt files for clean structured content. Use the public web pages for user-facing presentation and context.
